title: lippia spiraeastrum
intro: Lippia spiraeastrum, also known as the Brazilian lippia, is a plant species in the family Verbenaceae that is native to Brazil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lippia spiraeastrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Lippia spiraeastrum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in folk remedies in Brazil.
